title: polygala misella
intro: Polygala misella, also known as the small milkwort or poor me four o'clocks, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Polygala misella include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with various forms of preparation available to support its medicinal and health benefits.
